risk_factors: Pedestrian crossing in the middle of traffic without clear signal or protection
Multiple vehicles (cars, auto-rickshaws, motorcycles) in close proximity to pedestrian
Traffic congestion increasing risk of collision
Pedestrian not looking both ways before crossing
explanation: A pedestrian is crossing a busy street with multiple vehicles, including cars and auto-rickshaws, without apparent traffic control or pedestrian crossing signal. This creates a high risk of collision.
